title: Item disappears in FORMS
excerpt: Created a ”Company” dropdown column and populated it.  However when a selection is made in “Forms” and submitted, the selections blanks out (disappears) after several minutes, I have to select the “Company” again for it …

posts.author: GiovanniSmith (Giovanni Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Created a ”Company” dropdown column and populated it. However when a selection is made in “Forms” and submitted, the selections blanks out (disappears) after several minutes, I have to select the “Company” again for it to remain. Any assistance would be appreciated.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@GiovanniSmith

Sounds very strange. If you have not already, I recommend contacting monday support about this issue: support@monday.com.

Jim - Subscribe to The Monday Man
Watch Our Latest Video: monday.com Mirror Columns in Integromat - the Basics

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @GiovanniSmith

As Jim mentioned, if you ever feel like you are running into issues or weird behavior for a feature, then you will need to contact support@monday.com instead as we have a team specifically dedicated to Bug Busting that can help you with this!

To best help them out, please make sure you follow these steps and send them the results:

  • Try reproducing the issue in an incognito window.

  • Try accessing the platform through a different web browser: List of our supported browsers.

It would also be very helpful to see the behavior in action—that way we’ll be able to take a closer look and try to replicate the issue from our side if necessary. You can use the online tool loom.com to record for free and then send me a link Please ensure it does not include your sensitive data.

I hope this helps!

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
